ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mutual_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutual fund scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutual fund scheme */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the mutual fund scheme was launched */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Ratings of the mutual fund scheme */,
  "one_year_return" REAL /* 1-year return percentage of the mutual fund scheme */,
  "three_year_return" REAL /* 3-year return percentage of the mutual fund scheme */,
  "five_year_return" REAL /* 5-year return percentage of the mutual fund scheme */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Expense ratio percentage of the mutual fund scheme */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets of the mutual fund scheme in crores */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the mutual fund scheme (e.g., Equity, Debt, Hybrid) */,
  "investment_minimum" REAL /* Minimum investment amount required for the scheme */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the mutual fund scheme is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the mutual fund data was last updated */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date when the mutual fund scheme was first established */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* Benchmark index against which the mutual fund's performance is measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the fund manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the fund manager for contact purposes */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the fund manager */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the fund manager is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the fund manager's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_manager_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutual fund scheme */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the fund manager started managing the scheme */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the fund manager stopped managing the scheme (if applicable) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the assignment is currently active */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating given to the fund manager for their performance during the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_manager_assignments_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES mutual_funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_manager_assignments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES fund_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, financial advisor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutual fund scheme being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the mutual fund scheme */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the mutual fund scheme was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES mutual_funds ("fund_id")
)
